data.title: USD.AI Bridges DeFi and AI by Turning Stablecoins Into Loans for Nvidia GPUs
data.description:
USD.AI is revolutionizing the intersection of decentralized finance (DeFi) and artificial intelligence (AI) by developing a platform that transforms stablecoins into loans specifically designed for acquiring Nvidia GPUs, which are essential for high-performance computing. This innovative approach allows users to leverage their digital assets, making it easier for creators and businesses to access cutting-edge technology without the need for upfront capital. By facilitating this seamless conversion of stablecoins into funding for GPUs, USD.AI not only enhances financial accessibility but also empowers a new wave of AI-driven projects and applications.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/10/24/usdai-bridges-defi-and-ai-by-turning-stablecoins-into-loans-for-nvidia-gpus

data.title: CZ: Accused of terminating business relationships with no partners during imprisonment
data.description: In a social media post responding to community messages congratulating him on his pardon, CZ stated that despite the difficult period of accusations and imprisonment, no partners had terminated their business relationships. He stated, "While this experience was extremely difficult, it did not break me. While my official record was temporarily tarnished, my personal reputation remains strong. My family, friends, and community have always supported me; I have never walked alone." CZ concluded by declaring that he will continue to work hand in hand with the community.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETF Experiences Net Outflows Amid Market Lows
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Glassnode indicates that Bitcoin spot ETFs are currently experiencing a phase of net outflows. Historically, such occurrences are often observed at local market lows, reflecting a decline in investor sentiment. Glassnode highlights that when fund flows stabilize or shift to net inflows, historical data suggests this often coincides with a recovery in demand and the initial stages of a price rebound, potentially signaling the onset of a market recovery cycle.

data.title: OKX will launch TURTLEUSDT perpetual contracts on October 24, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description: According to official news, OKX will launch the TURTLEUSDT perpetual contract simultaneously on its website, app, and API at 18:00 (UTC+8) on October 24, 2025, supporting up to 50x leverage trading.

data.title: Sign Partners with Kyrgyzstan's National Bank on CBDC and Financial Infrastructure
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Sign has entered into a formal partnership with the National Bank of Kyrgyzstan during a national conference on cryptocurrency and digital assets. The collaboration focuses on central bank digital currency (CBDC) and financial infrastructure development.

Sign's Digital SOM currency is designed to directly serve Kyrgyzstan's population of 7.2 million and will be interoperable with the KGST stablecoin.

data.title: Two whales increased their holdings in PUMP, investing a total of approximately $5 million
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, whale BGSLvB withdrew $2 million USDC from Kraken 16 hours ago to purchase approximately 518 million PUMPs. Another whale, address 0x3024, deposited $3 million USDC into Hyperliquid an hour ago and opened a long position for 73.5 million PUMPs at 2x leverage, valued at approximately $3.04 million.

data.title: APRO announces the launch of its native token AT, with TGE scheduled for October 24th
data.description: APRO announced the launch of its native token, AT, to support business development, ecosystem expansion, incentive programs, and long-term sustainable growth. The total supply of tokens is capped at 1 billion, and the Token Generation Event (TGE) is scheduled for October 24, 2025. The official token distribution plan includes: 25% for the ecosystem, 20% for staking, 20% for investors, 15% for public distribution, 10% for the team, 5% for the foundation, 3% for liquidity, and 2% for operational activities. Officials stated that AT will serve as the core driving force of the APRO ecosystem, driving overall project growth and improving its governance system.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase to Allow Bitcoin and Ethereum as Collateral
data.description: JPMorgan plans to allow clients to use Bitcoin and Ethereum as collateral in its crypto business expansion. This move marks a major step for the bank in integrating traditional finance with crypto assets. (Bloomberg)

data.title: US Senate Democrats propose bill condemning Trump's pardon of CZ
data.description: Democrats in the U.S. Senate are pushing for a resolution to formally condemn President Trump's pardon of Binance founder Changpeng Zhao (CZ). Sources say several Republican lawmakers have also publicly criticized the decision, which may lead to a rare bipartisan opposition. According to reports, CZ was sentenced to four months in prison for money laundering charges, and Trump's pardon is believed to pave the way for Binance to return to the U.S. market. Senators leading the proposal include Elizabeth Warren (Massachusetts) and Adam Schiff (California). They called the move "blatant corruption" and called on Congress to take measures to prevent similar situations from happening again. Some analysts pointed out that this incident may affect the legislative process of the crypto market structure being promoted by Congress. Previously, World Liberty Financial, a crypto project under the Trump family, announced that it had received support from the UAE sovereign fund and planned to complete a $2 billion investment in Binance through the stablecoin issued by the project. (Axios)
